title: Dimension Generator
description: Algorithmic member generation with machine-discoverable OpenAPI definitions, applicable to any dimension type.

type.description: Short identifier for well-known algorithms or full URI for custom generators.

oneOf.description: Well-known generator type. Resolves to a registered OGC Definition URI.
Full URI for custom generator definitions.

api.description: OpenAPI definition URI. REQUIRED for custom generators. Implicit (resolvable from type) for well-known types. Machine clients fetch this to discover the generation endpoint.

parameters.description: Input parameters for the algorithm. Defined per JSON Schema 2020-12. Maps to the OpenAPI request schema.

output.description: Type and structure of each generated member. Defined per JSON Schema 2020-12. Maps to the OpenAPI response schema.

bijective.description: true if the generator is invertible (value to parameters). Enables /inverse capability.

on_invalid.description: Item ingestion behavior when inverse validation fails.
